# Alternative estimation views {#sec-alternative-views}

::: {.callout-note}
Drafted by a LLM-based AI tool (Claude Code/Opus 4.8). Scaffold — an outline of intended content and its source artifacts, not finished prose.
:::

{{< include ../_caveats-association.qmd >}}

Beyond the single randomised treatment term in each family, every coefficient here is an adjusted association (@sec-dag-traps).

*[Scaffold]* The gain- and level-factor families and the onset-aligned per-protocol view — different lenses on the same data. *Source:* `factor_summary.csv`, `treatment_marginal.csv`, `cohort_marginal.csv`.

## Gain factors {#sec-alternative-views-gain}

*[Scaffold]* ANCOVA on each period's post given its pre (LRPGF01–08); the on-intervention term is the **only** causal coefficient and reproduces $\tau$ — everything else is association.

## Level factors {#sec-alternative-views-level}

*[Scaffold]* The levels view (LRPLF01–08); only the t2 group contrast is a clean randomised effect — later timepoints are post-crossover associations.

## Onset-aligned per-protocol {#sec-alternative-views-aligned}

*[Scaffold]* Both arms aligned by intervention onset (LRPAL01–08); the cohort contrast is **not** randomised (age-at-onset / timing confound) — no term is flagged causal; dose enters only the sensitivity variant.
